title: papaver dubium subsp. erosum
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. erosum, also known as the small-flowered poppy or small-flowered meadow poppy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Papaver dubium subsp. erosum include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reducing anxiety and stress, as well as its potential to act as a natural pain reliever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to note that proper dosing and preparation are crucial for safe and effective use.
